name: Reset
comment: Reset: SEI; no $4020 write (no VS protection); wait 2 VBlanks; SP=$7F; JSR Init; STA $4F/$50=0; JSR DrawTitleScreen; STA $4B=0; then MainLoop

name: MainLoop
comment: MainLoop: JSR SetupNametableStage; JSR TitleWaitLoop; JSR PlayerSelectLoop; JSR StagePlay; JSR GameOverLoop; JMP MainLoop

name: StageStartSetup
comment: StageStartSetup: if $4B=0 → JSR ConstructionSetup; LDA $85; JSR $F000 (load stage tilemap); JSR $CAF5 (HUD); then JSR $C331 (SpawnPlayersInit); GAME LOOP at $C1F9: WaitVBlank; JSR $C2E6/$E23B/$E0D8/$DEA6; check Start to pause; JSR $C728 CheckGameOver; BEQ loop back. Exits to stage-clear / game-over handling.

name: GameVarsInit
comment: GameVarsInit: clears $0101/$0102; STA $66=$67=$4C=0; STA $51=$52=$6A=3; if 1P ($83=0) STA $52=0; STA $85=1; STA $46=0; RTS. Sub of NewGameSetup region.

name: StageStartInit
comment: StageStartInit: JSR ClearStageCCData; JSR ClearEntitySlots; set $0106/$0108; spawn P1 (if $51!=0) and P2 (if $52!=0) via SpawnEnemy; STA $7F=$80=20 (enemies=20); clear $8F/$0A/$4B/$45/$6F/$70/$89/$8A/$82/$86/$0100/$6A; JSR $C71E/$C8C0/WaitVBlank/$C830/$C859/$E42B; set $68=$80/$0312=$4C=1; calc SpawnDelayBase: $84=$BE-(stage*4); 2P: $84-=$14.

name: StagePlay
comment: StagePlay: sets $6D=1 (game active); $4D=0; JSR GameVarsInit; STA $52=3; clears $4F/$50/$0A/$0B; JSR ConstructionSetup; JSR $F000(A=$FF) blank map; STA $85=$1E; STA $46=2; draws STAGE sprites; JSR InitEntities; JSR WaitNMI; JSR StageStartInit; JSR DrawHUDInit; JSR WaitVBlank; falls into ResetEntitySlots ($6C=5); RTS.

name: GameOverLoop
comment: GameOverLoop: WaitVBlank; if Start/Select pressed ($08 & $0C) → exit; JSR $C642; JSR GameTickMain ($C2E6); JSR $E23B; JSR $DEA6; JSR $E0D8; JSR $C728; BEQ loop. Post-game animation/wait loop.

name: DrawScore
comment: DrawScore (tentative): called from GameOverLoop

name: InitSpawnPoints
comment: InitSpawnPoints (tentative): called from StageStartInit

name: CheckGameOver
comment: CheckGameOver: if $68=0 (eagle destroyed) → show explosion sprite → RTS A=1; if $80=0 (no enemies on screen) → RTS A=1 (stage clear); if $51+$52=0 (all lives lost) → RTS A=1 (game over); else RTS A=0 (continue).

name: DrawHUDScores
comment: DrawHUDScores (tentative): called after WaitVBlank in stage start

name: DrawHUDLives
comment: DrawHUDLives (tentative): called after DrawHUDScores in stage start

name: InitStageHUD
comment: InitStageHUD (tentative): called from StageStartInit

name: DrawHUDInit
comment: DrawHUDInit: draws 4 HUD strings to nametable at rows $18-$1B column $0C; also puts a sprite (tile $23/$F3) into OAM via $0180+$0C; clears $07F3; masks $07F4 & $CC; RTS.

name: TitleWaitLoop
comment: TitleWaitLoop: clears $4F/$50; loops WaitVBlank + INC $4F; checks $08 AND #$04 (SELECT new press); if no press and $4F<$F0 (240 frames)

name: PlayerSelectLoop
comment: PlayerSelectLoop: $4D=3; SELECT(bit2/$08)=INC $83 (cycle 0→1→2→0: 1P/2P/CONSTRUCTION); cursor blink every 4 frames; P1-DOWN+P2-A → $4A+=16 (stage skip cheat); P1-RIGHT+P2-B → DEC $4A; START(bit3/$08) → dispatch via SelectDispatchTable

name: Start1P
comment: Start1P: $6C=5; JSR NewGameSetup; JMP GameInit

name: Start2P
comment: Start2P: $6C=7; JSR NewGameSetup; JMP GameInit

name: StartConstruction
comment: StartConstruction: $6C=7; JMP ConstructionEntry ($C0AE)

name: SelectDispatchTable
comment: SelectDispatchTable: ptr16[3]; [0]=$CA6F(1P) [1]=$CA74(2P) [2]=$CA7E(CONSTRUCTION); indexed by $83*2

name: UpdateCursorSprite
comment: UpdateCursorSprite: $98 = $8B + ($83 << 4); sets OAM sprite index for cursor tank

name: DrawTitleScreen
comment: DrawTitleScreen: sets nametable $24; draws BATTLE sprite-string at x=26 y=46; CITY at x=60 y=86; BG tiles $D2A5 at col=2 row=3; $D2A8 at col=11 row=3; HI-/SCORE headers; "1 PLAYER" row=17; "2 PLAYERS" row=19; "CONSTRUCTION" row=21; credits names row=23; copyright row=25; all rights row=27

name: NMI
comment: NMI: push A/X/Y/P; OAM DMA from $0200; read $2002; JSR HideOffscreenSprites; if $4D>=0 JSR PaletteUpdate; write PPUCTRL=$50|$B0; scroll X=0 Y=$4F; PPUMASK=$1E; JSR ReadControllers2 ($D689); JSR HideSpritePairs; JSR SoundEngineTick ($EA7E); INC $0B (frame lo); every 64 INC $0A (frame hi); RTI

name: Init
comment: Init: clears $60/$6B/$0C/$0D/$6D; $4D=$FF (skip PPU updates); calls InitRAM; $0E=4; $6E=$20; WriteNametable; HideSpritePairs; ZeroSlot x3; if CheckSavedState: $3F=2 $83=0 (1P); WriteNametable x2; InitEntities; SoundResetInit

name: CheckSavedState
comment: CheckSavedState: compare $0110-$011F with DefaultConfig at $C040; return A=1 if match (first boot)

name: ReadControllers2
comment: ReadControllers mirror at $D689 = same code as $9689; reads $4016/$4017 (P1/P2)
column6: edge-detects into $06-$09; called from NMI ($D433) NOT a sound routine despite old label

name: APUSoundInit
comment: APUSoundInit: STA $4015=$0F (enable sq1+sq2+tri+noise); STA $4017=$C0 (5-step frame counter no IRQ); zero 28 channel data blocks at $031C-$03FB (8B each) and $0300-$031B (status array); called at startup

name: SoundEngineTick
comment: SoundEngineTick: NMI-called each frame; $6D!=0→$F5=1 else $F5=28; pointer $F0/$F1=$031C (channel table); first pass scans active channels writes APU $4000+X*4; reads note seqs via $ECAF/ECBE; second pass silences idle channels

name: GetChannelDataPtr
comment: GetChannelDataPtr: X=$F4*2; loads $F2/$F3 from ChannelPtrTable($ECFE); used to point at each channel's note sequence

name: ReadChannelByte
comment: ReadChannelByte: read next byte from note sequence at ($F2)

name: NoteFreqTable
comment: NoteFreqTable: 12 note values (C through B) → APU period hi byte; used to set $4002/$4006/$400A/$400E

name: ChannelPtrTable
comment: ChannelPtrTable: 28 x u16le pointers to note sequence data; indexed by channel number $F4; each ptr points into ROM music/SFX data

name: DrawNametableText
comment: DrawNametableText: CalcNametableAddr; reads ($11)

name: DrawNametableTextOffset
comment: DrawNametableTextOffset: same as DrawNametableText but adds $60 to bytes with bit7=0 (for palette highlight mode)

name: DrawSpriteString
comment: DrawSpriteString: reads ($13)

name: WaitVBlank
comment: WaitVBlank: LDA $0B; CMP $0B; BEQ (spin until frame counter changes)

name: ReadControllers
comment: ReadControllers: STX $4016 (X=1 strobe hi); STY $4016 (Y=0 strobe lo); read 8 bits from $4016

name: str_WrittenBy
comment: str_WrittenBy: "WRITTEN BY" FF — staff credit header

name: str_CreditsNames
comment: str_CreditsNames: tile indices $60-$68 FF — staff name graphic tiles

name: str_Battle
comment: str_Battle: "BATTLE" FF — sprite tile indices for big logo (used by DrawSpriteString)

name: str_City
comment: str_City: "CITY" FF — sprite tile indices for big logo lower half

name: str_TilePairA
comment: str_TilePairA: $5E $6B FF — 2-tile BG sequence at col=2 row=3 (likely "namcot" logo corner or P1 label prefix)

name: str_TilePairB
comment: str_TilePairB: $5F $6B FF — 2-tile BG sequence at col=11 row=3

name: str_HI
comment: str_HI: "HI" $6B FF — score header HI- ($6B = '-' or special tile)

name: str_Score
comment: str_Score: "SCORE" FF — score label

name: str_1Player
comment: str_1Player: "1 PLAYER" FF — menu option 0

name: str_2Players
comment: str_2Players: "2 PLAYERS" FF — menu option 1

name: str_1PlayerHilit
comment: str_1PlayerHilit: $5E $6B "PLAYER" FF — highlighted 1P option (cursor + text)

name: str_2PlayersHilit
comment: str_2PlayersHilit: $5F $6B "PLAYER" FF — highlighted 2P option

name: str_Construction
comment: str_Construction: "CONSTRUCTION" FF — menu option 2

name: str_Copyright
comment: str_Copyright: "@1980 1985 NAMCO LTD" $69 FF — copyright line ($40='@'=copyright symbol tile)

name: str_AllRights
comment: str_AllRights: "ALL RIGHTS RESERVED" FF

name: str_LivesTile
comment: str_LivesTile: $14 FF — single tile for lives display

name: InterStageScreen
comment: InterStageScreen: after NewGameSetup; shows stage number; A=advance/B=go back ($85 cycles 1-35/$23); Start or timeout → begin gameplay at $C1C5; JSR $CA91 draws stage tiles to OAM buffer; loops at $C172

name: ResetEntitySlots
comment: ResetEntitySlots: STA $6C=#$05 (reset to 1P count); RTS; called at stage completion before GameOverLoop

name: EnemySpawnTick
comment: EnemySpawnTick: LDA $82 (spawn delay); if non-zero DEC and RTS; else check $7F (enemies remaining); if >0 scan $A0+$6C down to $A0+2 for free slot; if found LDA $84→STA $82; JSR SpawnEnemy ($E363); DEC $7F; else RTS

name: SpawnEnemy
comment: SpawnEnemy: X=slot; if X<2(player) load $E47A[X]→$90
column8: X; JMP $E3A9. If X>=2(enemy): INC $6A(wraps 0-2); posX=$E474[$6A]{$18
column12: X=$F0(spawn anim); PlaceTileBlock at posX/Y with A=$0F(blank).

name: FinalizeEntitySpawn
comment: FinalizeEntitySpawn: called after spawn/death animation; LDA $E47E[X]→$A0
column9: X; JMP $E3FA. If X>=2: find next non-zero type in $8B-$8E via $8F; DEC count; look up EntityTypeTable($E4EC)[(stage-1)*4+$8F]→$A8

name: PlayerMoveTick
comment: PlayerMoveTick: runs for entity slots 0-1 (players) only; checks $0B timing (every 1-2 frames); if $6F
column7: X direction bits; calls $E451 to decode direction; aligns pos to 8px; updates $A0

name: EntityMainLoop
comment: EntityMainLoop: X=7..0; for X>=2: checks $0100 invincibility timer; if $A0
column6: X bit7 set and <$E0: dispatch AI via EntityAIDispatch; for X<2 (players): dispatch every 1-2 frames. Dispatches via $DC3D (AI table lookup).

name: EntityAIDispatch
comment: EntityAIDispatch: Y=(($A0
column7: Y); JMP(ptr). Routes to: $F0-state→$DE55(spawn anim); $E0-state→$DE64(death anim); $A0/$A2-state→$DC7C(movement AI).

name: EntityMovementAI
comment: EntityMovementAI: if X<2(player) skip direction-change check; else if posX&7=0 AND posY&7=0 AND rand($D44D)&$0F=0: call $DE72(AI choose direction). Then: dir=($A0
column6: X)&$03; dX=$E46C[dir]×8 dY=$E470[dir]×8; $56=posX+dX $57=posY+dY; collision check via $DD6E/$DD76/$D706; update pos.

name: SpawnAnimTick
comment: SpawnAnimTick: INC $A0
column6: X(from $F0 up); after 14 steps(low nibble=$0E): STA $A0
column7: X=$E0(transition to death/2nd-anim state); RTS. First phase of spawn star animation.

name: DeathAnimTick
comment: DeathAnimTick: INC $A0
column6: X(from $E0 up); after 14 steps(low nibble=$0E): JSR FinalizeEntitySpawn($E3B8); RTS. Second phase of spawn anim OR explosion anim → activates entity.

name: DirDeltaX
comment: DirDeltaX[4]: X movement delta per direction. dir0(up)=$00 dir1(left)=$FF(-1) dir2(down)=$00 dir3(right)=$01. Multiplied by 8 for pixel speed.

name: DirDeltaY
comment: DirDeltaY[4]: Y movement delta per direction. dir0(up)=$FF(-1) dir1(left)=$00 dir2(down)=$01 dir3(right)=$00. Multiplied by 8 for pixel speed.

name: EnemySpawnX
comment: EnemySpawnX[3]: enemy spawn X positions (rotated via $6A 0..2): $18(24) $78(120) $D8(216) = left/center/right spawn columns.

name: EnemySpawnY
comment: EnemySpawnY[3]: enemy spawn Y positions: all $18(24) = top row of play area.

name: PlayerSpawnX
comment: PlayerSpawnX[2]: player spawn X: slot0=$58(88) slot1=$98(152).

name: PlayerSpawnY
comment: PlayerSpawnY[2]: player spawn Y: both $D8(216) = bottom area.

name: EntityInitStatus
comment: EntityInitStatus[8]: initial $A0 value per slot after spawn: slots 0-1=$A0(player); slots 2-7=$A2(enemy active).

name: EntityStateTable
comment: EntityStateTable[16×2]: AI function pointers indexed by ($A0

name: EntityTypeTable
comment: EntityTypeTable[35×4]: entity type byte per stage per enemy-type-slot. Values: $80=basic $A0=fast $C0=power $E0→$E3=armor(4-hit). Loaded by FinalizeEntitySpawn via $8F index and $8B-$8E counts. 35 stages × 4 enemy types = 140 bytes ($E4EC–$E577).

name: DrawEnemiesLeft
comment: DrawEnemiesLeft: called after DEC $7F; updates enemy-remaining display

name: GameTickMain
comment: GameTickMain: 14+ subsystem JSR calls per frame: $E181/$DB75/$DBF1/$E1FA/$E02E/$E2A9/$E27C/$E122/$E162/$DB48(EnemySpawnTick)/$E604/$E910/$E70C/$E972/$C972/$DB0B/$C7C8/$C31D; called from GameOverLoop and StageStartSetup game loop.

name: Add16Ptr
comment: Add16Ptr: CLC; ADC $11; STA $11; BCC done; INC $12. Adds A to 16-bit ptr at $11/$12.

name: PlaceTileBlock
comment: PlaceTileBlock: takes nibble in A + pixel XY in $56/$57; maps pixel→nametable addr via $D713; looks up attribute in $DABB[nibble]→$04; updates attr table; writes 4 tiles from $DACB[nibble*4] in 2×2 pattern via $D784; advances ptr by 1/$1F/1.

name: TileAttrTable
comment: TileAttrTable[16]: palette attr per block nibble type. Types 0-4→$00(pal0/brick); 5-9→$03(pal3/steel); A→$01; B→$02; C→$03; D-F→$00(empty).

name: TileTypeTable
comment: TileTypeTable[16*4]: 4 tile indices per block nibble type. 0-3=partial brick ($00/$0F patterns); 4=full brick ($0F×4); 5-8=partial steel ($10/$20 patterns); 9=full steel ($10×4); A=water ($12×4); B=forest ($22×4); C=ice ($21×4); D-F=empty ($00×4).

name: ClearStageCCData
comment: ClearStageCCData: clears $CC-$D5 (10 bytes; stage-specific counters/vars).

name: ClearEntitySlots2
comment: ClearEntitySlots2: clears $A0-$A7 (entity status slots 0-7) and $0103-$010A (entity RAM mirror).

name: LoadStageEnemyCounts
comment: LoadStageEnemyCounts: if $46≠0 use stage 35 ($23) else use $85; Y=(stage-1)*4; load $E578[Y..Y+3]→$8B/$8C/$8D/$8E (4 enemy type counts).

name: StageEnemyCountTable
comment: StageEnemyCountTable[35*4]: 4 enemy-type counts per stage (always sum to 20). Stage 1: [18

name: LoadStageData
comment: LoadStageData: takes stage# in A; $FF→36; ptr=$F07A; advance $5B/stage; decode 13×13 nibble grid (7 bytes/row=13 data+1 pad); call PlaceTileBlock for each nibble at pixel positions (16..208

name: StageDataTable
comment: StageDataTable: 35 stages × $5B (91) bytes each. Nibble-encoded 13×13 block grid. Each row=7 bytes (13 data nibbles + 1 padding nibble). Starts at $F07A; stage N at $F07A+(N-1)*$5B.
